title: Artificial Peony Stem, Faux Silk Lavender Tintagel Peony Spray, Fake Pink Flower Realistic Cottage Garden Purple Spring Flower Spray with Bud
features: Add a sophisticated and elegant touch to your home decor or event arrangements with this beautiful Lavender Tintagel Artificial Peony Spray

Crafted with attention to detail, each artificial peony stem boasts a realistic open flower head and a smaller bud with lifelike petals and lush foliage, creating a fresh, natural look without the maintenance of live flowers
It looks lovely as part of a mixed silk fower arrangement but also looks gorgeous on its own
Perfect for wedding bouquets, home décor, or event centerpieces, this artificial peony spray provides everlasting beauty without the maintenance of real flowers
Enjoy the charm of fresh-cut peony all year round, without wilting or fading
We are a UK based small business with a shop in Ross-on-Wye. If you have any queries or require any after sales support, our friendly customer services team will be more than happy to help
